meta.title: IQF Frozen Berries, Fruits, Vegetables & Mushrooms Supplier | Europe
meta.description: Trusted supplier of IQF frozen berries, fruits, vegetables and mushrooms for food manufacturers, processors and wholesale buyers across Europe. Certified quality, reliable logistics and consistent year-round supply.

home.title: Frozen & Dried Berries, Fruits, Mushrooms and Vegetables — Carpathian Manufacturer & Exporter
home.sec_title: We produce and supply high-quality frozen and dried berries, fruits, mushrooms and vegetables

description: We are a family-owned private company with over a decade of experience in the industrial processing and export of frozen and dried berries, fruits, mushrooms, and vegetables. Since 2010, we have built our operations around one core principle: delivering consistent, certified quality at scale for international B2B partners. From hand-picked raw materials to advanced processing technologies, every stage of our production is designed to meet the expectations of demanding European markets.

All our products are grown and harvested exclusively in environmentally clean regions of Ukraine, where favorable climatic conditions and long-standing agricultural traditions ensure high-quality raw materials. We work closely with trusted farmers and carefully control the harvesting process to preserve the natural taste, color, and nutritional value of our products. Depending on the type of product and customer requirements, we use IQF freezing, sun drying, or drying in specialized drying chambers.

Quality and food safety are the foundation of our business. Our facilities operate in full compliance with international standards, including HACCP, ISO, and Organic certifications. This commitment allows us to act not just as a supplier, but as a reliable long-term partner for EU buyers seeking transparency, flexibility, and dependable volumes. We combine family ownership with industrial precision - delivering natural products you can trust, season after season.

ourCertificates.desc: We adhere to the highest safety and quality standards, confirmed by our HACCP and Organic certificates. These international certifications ensure that our berries, fruits, and vegetables are natural, safe, and fully compliant with the requirements of organic production.

desc: Our high-quality IQF (Individually Quick Frozen) bilberries are wild-harvested and carefully hand-picked at peak ripeness to ensure superior taste, color, and nutritional value. Sourced from pristine European forests, these berries are immediately frozen using advanced IQF technology to lock in their natural freshness, texture, and antioxidants.
Ideal for food manufacturers, wholesalers, and export markets, our frozen bilberries deliver consistent quality for use in juices, jams, dairy products, bakery applications, nutraceuticals, and more.

No additives, preservatives, or added sugar
Fully traceable and compliant with EU food safety standards

q.1: What types of wholesale frozen berries and natural products do you offer?
q.2: Where are your Carpathian berries and fruits sourced?
q.3: Do you supply certified organic wholesale berries?
q.4: Can I place bulk or wholesale orders for industrial food processing?
q.5: How do you ensure food safety and quality control?
q.6: What industrial packaging options do you provide?

a.1: We specialize in premium IQF (Individually Quick Frozen) wholesale berries and natural products sourced directly from the pristine Carpathian region. Our core product portfolio includes wild blueberries, cultivated raspberries, forest blackberries, wild cranberries, and sour cherries. Depending on your manufacturing needs, we supply our fruits in fresh, blast-frozen, or semi-processed states tailored for industrial bakeries, dairy producers, jam manufacturers, and food service distributors.
a.2: All of our agricultural products are sustainably harvested and sourced from the ecologically clean Carpathian region, celebrated for its minimal industrial footprint and rich biodiversity. We partner directly with a strictly vetted network of local farmers and certified wild-craft collectors. This direct-from-source model ensures complete batch traceability, authentic geographical origin, and a transparent agricultural supply chain.
a.3: Yes, we supply certified organic wholesale berries alongside our conventional natural crops. Because our fruits are harvested from high-altitude, low-intervention, and wild environments, they are inherently natural. We maintain official organic certification to comply with strict international organic farming regulations. Please contact our sales team to confirm our current organic batch volumes, seasonal availability, and to request our certification documentation.
a.4: Absolutely. We are a specialized B2B supplier and wholesale distributor equipped to handle high-volume commercial contracts. We regularly supply bulk frozen fruit orders to food manufacturers, ingredient distributors, and food factories across Europe. We offer scalable pricing tiers based on contract volumes, multi-ton logistics support, and scheduled year-round supply agreements to keep your production lines moving.
a.5: We implement a rigorous, multi-stage quality assurance framework backed by our official HACCP certification. Our quality control starts directly at the hand-picking phase, followed by strict sorting, mechanical cleaning, and inline metal detection. This process ensures our final bulk shipments are free from foreign bodies, comply with strict Maximum Residue Limits (MRLs), and arrive at your facility with a full Certificate of Analysis (COA) guaranteeing food safety.
a.6: We specialize exclusively in high-volume B2B distribution and offer industrial packaging options designed to preserve the integrity of the cold chain during transport. We do not offer retail-ready packaging or private label services. Instead, we focus on heavy-duty bulk packaging solutions, including 10kg/25kg multi-layer industrial bags, octabins, and large bulk containers optimized for commercial food processing and automated manufacturing lines.

q.5: What are the strict cold storage requirements for your frozen berries?
q.6: What is the commercial shelf life of your wholesale frozen products?

a.1: We supply a premium selection of wild-harvested and cultivated Carpathian berries, specializing in wild blueberries, forest blackberries, premium raspberries, cranberries, and sour cherries. Our product inventory satisfies rigorous commercial specifications for caliber size, color sorting, and mechanical purity, ensuring absolute consistency for high-volume food manufacturers and ingredients distributors.
a.2: We specialize in both fresh seasonal distributions and year-round Individually Quick Frozen (IQF) solutions. Our blast-freezing technology instantly preserves the cell structure, peak flavor, and nutritional profile of the freshly picked berries. While fresh berries are strictly volume-scheduled during harvesting cycles, our certified organic and conventional IQF frozen fruits are stocked in our cold storage facilities for reliable year-round global supply.
a.3: Our primary wild-craft and agricultural harvest season extends from early summer to autumn (June through September), which is when our fresh shipping windows open. However, because we instantly process our raw yield using advanced IQF technology, our bulk frozen berries are completely decoupled from seasonal constraints and remain available for high-volume wholesale distribution 365 days a year.
a.4: We provide heavy-duty industrial packaging configurations optimized for food processing plants and commercial manufacturing lines. We focus entirely on bulk B2B distribution and do not offer retail packaging or private label co-packing. Our standard wholesale options include 10kg/25kg multi-layer industrial paper bags, heavy-gauge plastic crates, and high-capacity octabins designed to protect product integrity during freight.
a.5: To uphold our strict HACCP food safety standards and prevent product clustering, our IQF frozen berries must be stored constantly at an unbroken deep-freeze temperature of -18°C or lower. Maintaining an uninterrupted cold chain from our freezing facilities to your manufacturing plant is absolutely critical to preventing temperature fluctuations, preserving enzymatic stability, and halting microbial growth.
a.6: When maintained continuously under proper deep-freeze conditions (-18°C or colder), our premium wholesale IQF berries possess a commercial shelf life of 12 to 24 months. Each bulk container leaves our facility stamped with accurate lot tracking codes, manufacturing dates, and clear expiration timelines, accompanied by a comprehensive Certificate of Analysis (COA) for your quality assurance records.

q.1: In what manufacturing forms is this ingredient available?
q.2: Is this industrial fruit product available for year-round supply?
q.3: What are the strict storage requirements for this product?
q.4: What is the certified commercial shelf life of this batch?
q.5: Do you provide high-volume bulk or wholesale options for this item?
q.6: Can I request custom industrial packaging configurations for this product?

a.1: This premium Carpathian ingredient is available in industrial-grade fresh forms during peak harvest, or as premium Individually Quick Frozen (IQF) selections year-round. Depending on your manufacturing specifications, we can offer the product color-sorted, calibrated by millimeter size, or semi-processed to integrate seamlessly into automated food production lines, dairy manufacturing, or industrial baking applications.
a.2: Yes. While fresh, non-frozen batches are strictly tied to our seasonal harvesting calendar, our IQF (Individually Quick Frozen) fruit products are processed at peak nutritional maturity and stored in deep-freeze facilities. This advanced preservation enables us to guarantee a continuous, uninterrupted wholesale supply to our B2B partners 365 days a year, regardless of the crop's calendar season.
a.3: To preserve cell structure, flavor profile, and total food safety, strict cold-chain protocols must be followed. Fresh orders require immediate humidity-controlled refrigeration and rapid processing. Our IQF deep-frozen products must be maintained continuously at a stable temperature of -18°C or lower to prevent enzymatic degradation and clustering, ensuring full compliance with international HACCP safety guidelines.
a.4: The commercial shelf life depends entirely on the product form. Freshly harvested batches are highly perishable and require immediate food processing or distribution within a few days under refrigeration. Our IQF frozen items possess a robust shelf life of 12 to 24 months when held continuously at -18°C, retaining their natural color, structure, and microbiological stability.
a.5: Yes, we operate exclusively as a direct agricultural B2B supplier and wholesale distributor. We specialize in contract manufacturing and large-scale, multi-ton deliveries for food factories, ingredients distributors, and industrial processing plants. Please reach out to our commercial sales office to receive a tailored quotation, specifications sheets, and current Minimum Order Quantity (MOQ) metrics.
a.6: While we specialize strictly in heavy-duty wholesale distribution and do not offer retail-ready or private label packaging, we do provide flexible industrial packaging configurations. We can fulfill bulk orders in multi-layer 10kg/25kg industrial paper bags, heavy-gauge plastic crates, or high-capacity octabins tailored to match your specific manufacturing intake systems and shipping requirements.
